HomePage.title: TaskFlow - Kanban task management board
HomePage.description: Simple, beautiful, convenient board for managing your projects and tasks

hero.chip: Built with Next.js · NestJS · Zustand · TanStack Query
hero.heading: Manage tasks with
hero.subtitle: TaskFlow is a beautiful Kanban board that helps organize work, track progress, and resolve important tasks faster.

dragDrop.title: Drag & Drop
dragDrop.desc: Move tasks between columns with drag & drop. Reorder columns in seconds.

fast.title: Incredibly fast
fast.desc: Thanks to optimistic updates, the UI responds instantly. No need to wait for a server response.

auth.title: Authentication
auth.desc: JWT tokens stored in httpOnly cookies. Automatic silent refresh keeps you logged in.

themes.title: Custom themes
themes.desc: Dark and light themes with a beautiful custom Material UI palette.

boards.title: Multiple boards
boards.desc: Create as many boards as you need. Use color coding for easy navigation.

templates.title: Board templates
templates.desc: Start from an empty board or generate a ready Scrum workflow with columns in the right order.

welcomeBoard.title: Welcome board
welcomeBoard.desc: New accounts receive a localized demo board with open and completed tasks, so analytics are useful from day one.

analytics.title: Completion analytics
analytics.desc: Track completed tasks by day, week, and month, including on-time and late completion summaries.

pendingChanges.title: Pending changes queue
pendingChanges.desc: Offline task edits and moves are queued safely, then can be applied or discarded after the connection returns.

ssr.title: Rendering & cache
ssr.desc: Protected boards render dynamically with TanStack hydration, while shared board content uses tagged cache revalidated by the backend.

HomePage.footer: TaskFlow - Next.js · NestJS · Zustand · Material UI

Register.title: Register
Register.heading: Register
Register.subtitle: Start working with TaskFlow today
Register.name: Full name
Register.avatarHint: Optional PNG, JPEG or WebP, up to 2 MB. A default avatar is created if skipped.

avatarError.size: The avatar must not exceed 2 MB.
avatarError.type: Choose a PNG, JPEG or WebP image.

Boards.title: My boards
Boards.globalDescription: All boards you can access, grouped by workspace.
Boards.emptyWorkspaceTitle: There are no accessible boards in this workspace yet

BoardPage.title: Board {id}
BoardPage.permissionDenied: Your role does not allow this change.
BoardPage.membersDescription: View board access, add workspace members, and manage their roles.
BoardPage.shareDescription: Choose a workspace member who does not have access to this board yet.
BoardPage.shareNoAvailableMembers: Every workspace member already has access to this board.
BoardPage.shareError: Failed to give access to the board.

filters.title: Filters
filters.reorderDisabled: Drag and drop is disabled in filtered view

ProfilePage.profileDescription: Manage your account and active sessions.
ProfilePage.avatarDescription: Use an image that helps teammates recognize you.
ProfilePage.avatarHint: PNG, JPEG or WebP, up to 2 MB.

avatarError.size: The avatar must not exceed 2 MB.
avatarError.type: Choose a PNG, JPEG or WebP image.

ProfilePage.sessionsDescription: See your devices and end unused sessions.

WorkspaceOverview.subtitle: One context for boards, teams, and your tasks.
WorkspaceOverview.emptyBoards: There are no accessible boards in this workspace yet.
WorkspaceOverview.myUpcomingTasksDescription: Open tasks assigned to you in this workspace.

WorkspaceMyTasks.title: My tasks
WorkspaceMyTasks.description: Tasks assigned to you on accessible boards in the current workspace.
WorkspaceMyTasks.emptyDescription: Tasks will appear here once someone assigns them to you.

WorkspaceTeamsPage.title: Teams
WorkspaceTeamsPage.description: Manage workspace teams and their members.

WorkspaceSettings.title: Workspace settings
WorkspaceSettings.notFound: Workspace not found or access denied.
WorkspaceSettings.membersDescription: People who can participate in boards and future teams in this workspace.
WorkspaceSettings.memberUpdateError: Failed to update the member role.
WorkspaceSettings.removeMemberConfirm: Remove {name} from this workspace? They will also lose access to its boards.
WorkspaceSettings.memberRemoveError: Failed to remove the workspace member.

WorkspaceTeams.title: Teams
WorkspaceTeams.description: Group workspace members and assign tasks to the right discipline.
WorkspaceTeams.emptyDescription: Create a team for developers, design, management, or any workflow you need.
WorkspaceTeams.name: Team name
WorkspaceTeams.saveError: Failed to save the team. Check that its name is unique.
WorkspaceTeams.noMembers: No members in this team yet.
WorkspaceTeams.deleteConfirm: Delete {team}? Tasks will remain, but their team assignment will be cleared.

WorkspaceInvites.title: Invite links
WorkspaceInvites.description: Create public links for people to join this workspace.
WorkspaceInvites.empty: There are no active invite links.
WorkspaceInvites.allowedEmailHint: Optional restriction to one exact email address.
WorkspaceInvites.createError: Failed to create the invite link.
WorkspaceInvites.createdDescription: The raw link is shown only once. Copy it now.
WorkspaceInvites.copyError: Failed to copy the invite link.
WorkspaceInvites.revokeError: Failed to revoke the invite link.

WorkspaceInvite.unavailableDescription: This invitation has expired, was revoked, reached its usage limit, or does not exist.
WorkspaceInvite.acceptError: Could not join the workspace. Check that your email matches the invitation restrictions.

TaskDetail.title: Title
TaskDetail.readOnly: You have view-only access to this task.

Notifications.permissionDenied: Your role does not allow this change.
Notifications.taskQueued: No connection. Change added to pending changes.

PendingChanges.title: Unsaved changes
PendingChanges.description: There are {count} task changes waiting for connection. Apply them now?
PendingChanges.readOnlyDescription: There are {count} pending changes, but your current role is view-only. They cannot be applied.
PendingChanges.permissionChanged: Some pending changes were discarded because your permissions changed.
